channel.title: Agi on jamesm.blog
channel.description: Recent content in Agi on jamesm.blog

item.title: Demis Hassabis: The DeepMind Chief Playing the Long Game
item.description: A grounded look at Demis Hassabis - the chess prodigy turned video game designer turned neuroscientist who co-founded DeepMind, won the 2024 Nobel Prize in Chemistry for AlphaFold, and now runs the part of Google trying to build AGI on a longer time horizon than the rest of the industry.
